name: image-to-web-design
description: Marketplace hosting the image-to-web-design plugin: agent-facing skills for converting design images into pixel-perfect React webpages.

plugins.name: image-to-web-design
plugins.description: A kit of five skills for the design-image-to-React-webpage pipeline: four layered primitives (image-edit-instruction, image-isolation-technique, image-cut, image-to-web-design) plus a self-contained ChatGPT edition (image-to-web-design-chatgpt).
